name: Hillary Clinton
subject: by tonight?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Last chance to get your name on the wall. | Friend --

I’m thrilled to see how many people have stepped up to have their name permanently added to the campaign’s official Donor Wall.

Knowing that I can walk into headquarters and see the names of the people who are standing with me means so much.

**I hope you won’t miss your chance to be a part of this. The deadline is midnight tonight:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/get-on-the-wall/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMzMzU3NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzAwMzczS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMzMzU3NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzAwMzczS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMzMzU3NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzAwMzczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMzMzU3NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzAwMzczS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzMzU3NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzAwMzczS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMzMzU3NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzAwMzczS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMzMzU3NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzAwMzczS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMzMzU3NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzAwMzczS0&mt=1&rt=0)

The deadline is midnight tonight: Thanks, Hillary ****Did someone forward this email to you? | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Stephen Colbert
body:
Running for President can be a taxing and grueling job, but it also presents you with some truly once in a lifetime opportunities. Friend, I want to share one of those opportunities with you.

On September 8th, I'm going to sit down with Stephen Colbert for his very first taping as host of the Late Show, and I have an extra VIP ticket I'd like to share with you.

**Today we 're formally launching our Stephen Colbert Late Show contest, where we'll fly one lucky winner to New York for an all-expense paid trip to watch the very first taping of the Late Show with Stephen Colbert live. **

[**All you have to do is chip in $3 or more right now to enter.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bjckvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnpjgzg_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ugfbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjhgncf_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Friend, attending the Late Show and an all expenses paid trip to New York are incredible as is, but to get a VIP ticket to the very first taping of the Late Show with a new host, that's something you'll still be talking about 20 years from now.

**If you want a chance at history, then I need you to chip in $3 or more right now and enter:[Jeb2016.com/late-show-sweepstakes/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/yfkryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwsfkvb_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Don't forget: your flight, hotel, everything is on us.

[So don't delay, chip in $3 or more right now to secure your chance at winning.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/qvvqyvdrhfgtncnmtvbqhtjcddtjrcyrqvpvgrcmvgdh_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thanks for your support, and I hope to see you in the Empire State soon.

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/tbhfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtlbvpp_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3250&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://jeb2016.com/late-show-sweepstakes-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://jeb2016.com/late-show-sweepstakes/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/late-show-sweepstakes-donate/?lang=en). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/late-show-sweepstakes/). Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Monday, August 24, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Saturday, September 5, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time on Saturday, September 5, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: one (1) round-trip coach class plane ticket in the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,000; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; one (1) ticket to attend the series premiere of The Late Show with Stephen Colbert with an approximate retail value of $0; dinner with National Finance Co-Chair Woody Johnson, with an approximate retail value of $250; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $1,475. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](https://jeb2016.com/late-show-sweepstakes-rules/). The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

name: Lauren Fritts
subject: Snapping It Like It Is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| |
| | | Peter - If you know anything about Chris Christie you know that he is the **"YouTube Governor."** So it should come as no surprise that the entire family is just as savvy. Over the weekend, we decided to show just how social media savvy the Christie family really is at the Iowa State Fair. Mrs. Christie, known to us as "MPC," took over the **[@ChrisChristie Instagram account](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573917:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r)** and the kids, Andrew, Sarah, Patrick and Bridget, took over the **campaign's Christie.2016 Snapchat account.** Mrs. Christie shared some great family moments including the kids goofing off on the rides, mugging for the camera in front of the infamous butter cow, and flipping pork chops with Governor Branstad. **[Check it out here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573917:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r)**. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573917:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r) The Christie kids still managed to steal the show with their **Snapchat takeover**. They provided a "behind the scenes" look at the campaign and still managed to share some fun moments, including when they broke away from their dad to check out the fair on their own. This was the first time a campaign has done a social takeover of this capacity and, as you can tell, we had a lot of fun in the process. **If you missed the LIVE Snapchat story,[you can watch it on YouTube here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573918:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r).**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573918:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r) The kids didn't get to have ALL the fun. **[We featured the Governor on our first LIVE Facebook video, where he and MPC showed off their bartending skills](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573919:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r)**. Who knew? [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573919:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r) If you don't already, make sure to follow all of our social media accounts on **[Facebook](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573920:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r)** , **[Twitter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573921:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r)** , **[Instagram](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573917:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r)** , **[YouTube](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573922:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r)** , and Snapchat (add us on the app by searching for chrischristie.2016). **We promise not to disappoint.**
Lauren Fritts
Digital Director **** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43573923:18860371214:m:1:1516426255:EAF9246A5CAA502BB53AC6A0B2EC76D2:r)
---

---
